title: 阪神大賞典の後に・長

text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I haven't had enough.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm not satisfied with this. More! I need more!

After the race, I hear some interesting news on my
way to meet Narita Brian.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What is it, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yeah?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Mejiro McQueen, are the rumors true?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, they are. I will be competing in this year's
spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
O-oh! In that case, do you think you're fully
prepared?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Infallibly. It is my plan to bring honor to the
Mejiro family with an outstanding performance.

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
By any chance, did you make the decision
because of—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, come now. I was merely indicating my
intent.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My intent to take the crown of the strongest
stayer in history, that is.

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Ooohhh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I also heard that Mihono Bourbon will be racing.
Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Rather exciting, wouldn't you say?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I see.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Let's enter the spring Tenno Sho as well.
choice_data_list: It's not really the most typical route...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: That's why we'll do it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
We wouldn't have stayed together all this time if
you were one to chicken out.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: By the way...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
How long are you planning on standing here? I
want to get changed...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Look, I know how much you like to worry.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
And I know you're always looking out for me. But
this won't be a repeat of that summer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Relax. I'll be fine.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: If you got it, then hurry up and get out of here.

And so, drawn by the prospect of facing off
against strong adversaries, we decide to aim for
the spring Tenno Sho.
